//: UNIFIED mcpServers BLUEPRINT — single source of truth for local MCP servers.
//consumers: Claude Code (via scripts/mcp-sync.sh -> user scope) AND avante.nvim (via mcphub.nvim, which reads this file directly: see config/nvim/lua/plugins/mcp.lua).
//servers: Official MCP reference servers (modelcontextprotocol/servers). npx=Node, uvx=Python. Both fetch on demand; nothing installed globally.
//portable: Paths use ${HOME} (expanded by both consumers). filesystem is scoped to ~/dev — change it if your code lives elsewhere.
//node-on-path: npx servers prepend ${HOME}/.local/bin to PATH. On WSL+nvm, bootstrap.sh symlinks the Linux node toolchain there so spawns don't fall back to Windows node (whose UNC banner corrupts MCP stdio). On a VPS with system node it's a harmless no-op (system node is already on PATH).
//maintenance: Edit here, then run scripts/mcp-sync.sh to propagate to Claude Code. mcphub.nvim picks up changes on :MCPHub (press R to restart the hub).
